response.justification: Strong technical foundation with 19 years of experience across full-stack systems, demonstrated large-scale production work (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby), and consistent technical leadership at Staff level. However, lacks explicit experimentation platform, feature-flagging, A/B testing, or telemetry infrastructure experience—the core of this Principal role. While testing/quality mindset is evident, the absence of metrics-driven experimentation systems, bias detection, and rollout-risk management frameworks represents a critical gap. Could grow into the role with domain expertise transfer, but not an obvious Principal-level fit.
strengths: Large-scale systems experience: Built low-latency, high-throughput infrastructure handling millions of requests/second with microservices, caching, and real-time data (Dunnhumby).
Multi-disciplinary technical depth: Full-stack expertise across web, mobile, embedded, backend, and infrastructure with proficiency in JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, C/C++.

Technical leadership and quality culture: Multiple Staff-level positions, organized code dojos and testing workshops, created testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)—demonstrates ability to raise engineering standards.
concerns: Missing core experimentation domain: No evidence of designing/shipping experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, A/B testing frameworks, or rollout-risk management—central to this Principal role.
Limited data/metrics/telemetry focus: No demonstrated experience with metrics infrastructure, telemetry systems, or statistical analysis for experimentation—a required qualification.
Language gaps and recent role mismatch: Python not listed (preferred), no C# mentioned (required); current re:cinq work focuses on AI-agent infrastructure, not growth/experimentation systems.
